summary:
Training completed in 18.9 hours (52 epochs).
Best performance achieved at epoch 51.

Key Metrics:
- mAP@50: 0.8490 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
- mAP@50-95: 0.5125 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
- Precision: 0.8469 (accuracy of positive predictions)
- Recall: 0.7863 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 1.3493
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.5125 indicates strong overall detection accuracy
✅ High recall: 0.7863 - model captures most objects in images
✅ High precision: 0.8469 - low false positive rate
recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
